name: freellmapi-extended

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev -w server" "npm run dev -w client"
scripts.test: npm run test -w server && npm run test -w client
scripts.build: npm run build -w server && npm run build -w client

description: Free OpenAI-compatible LLM gateway & aggregator — one endpoint in front of 150+ free models across 15+ providers, with health-aware routing and automatic fallback. Self-hosted.
